raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2023, XXXX charged my American Express account and eventually shipped me an empty box, lying to Amex in the dispute process that they wouldve delivered a XXXX XXXX computer. I am still in possession of the sealed box as evidence, but Amex is unwilling to look at the clear evidence Im providing as a part of the dispute. Now Im being charged for something I have never received and Amex is not helping.
